speaker: Nora McInerny
episode_or_content_title: We don't "move on" from grief. We move forward with it
verification_notes: Verified 2026-06-04: official TED channel (channel_id UCAuUUnT6oDeKwE6v1NGQxug). Excerpt confirmed verbatim against the official TED manual English captions at 5:46–6:54 (yt-dlp). The portable principle ('move forward with, not on from') generalizes beyond bereavement to any identity-altering ending. Embed via youtube-nocookie.
